TextView.android:text: All 8 violation types on one page
Every BrowserStack Issue Detection Agent rule is violated multiple times below. This screen mirrors the eight single-issue screens. Scan it to fire dozens of violations at once.
VIOLATION: 10 images containing text, none described properly
Each image visibly contains text. Screen readers get nothing, "image", "photo", "graphic", an empty string, a filename, or unrelated copy.
VIOLATION: 10 meaningful images, none with an adequate label
Missing/empty labels, generic words, a filename, a mismatched marketing label, and one image hidden from assistive tech via importantForAccessibility="no".
VIOLATION: interactable, Switch, Checkbox & Editable controls, none with a usable label
Missing/empty labels, generic words ("button", "icon", "banner"), a filename, a label that contradicts the action, and two custom clickable Views with no label at all.
Switch elements — Switch element content label
Checkbox elements — Checkbox element content label
Editable elements — Editable element content label
Switch & Checkbox: no android:text and no contentDescription (or a generic one). Editable: EditText with no hint, no contentDescription, and a visible "Email" caption not linked via labelFor.
Active noise cancelling with 32-hour battery life and adaptive EQ tuned for podcasts and music.
Mars rover finds new mineral deposit
The discovery, made by the Perseverance rover, suggests subsurface water flow continued long after the planet cooled.
Manage email, password, and linked devices.
Choose what you get pushed and emailed.
Control who can see your activity and profile.
More than 1 in 7 users rely on assistive tech on mobile. Apps that ignore them lock out paying customers and risk legal exposure.
Inclusive apps consistently see higher retention and stronger app-store reviews.
Inaccessible apps have triggered ADA and EU EAA complaints in every major market.

By continuing you agree that any data captured by this demo app may be used to train internal QA models, that you understand this is a synthetic accessibility test fixture, and that you will not redistribute the bundled APKs outside your organization.
VIOLATION 2: inline error labelled as heading
VIOLATION 3: every list item is a heading
GitHub — 3 new pull requests on app-apk
Mum — call me when you land
VIOLATION 4: ad / promo flagged as heading
